title: Claude Fable 5 Just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts compares Claude Fable 5 against Opus 4.8 for website design generation across three difficulty levels. He argues Fable 5 excels at extracting design patterns and building from visual blueprints, with success hinging on token efficiency and prompt strategy.
writeup: Jack Roberts tests Claude Fable 5 against Opus 4.8 on website design generation across three difficulty levels. The comparison centers on Fable 5's ability to extract design patterns and build from visual blueprints, with results tied to token efficiency and prompt strategy. The video touches on vision-language-action, few-shot learning, and visual extraction as the mechanisms behind the design outputs.
